name: Pineapple-Chipotle Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the diced pineapple, green pepper, red pepper, red onion, minced chipotle peppers, chopped cilantro, lime zest, and lime juice.
2. Add the sugar, chili powder, coriander, cumin, and salt to the bowl. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
